description: All-vehicle fleet size and avg/oldest/newest first-registration year. Use when user asks the all-vehicle fleet's age. Passenger-car only: dmr-car-fleet-overview.

configuration.query: FROM dmr-raw-000002 | WHERE KoeretoejRegistreringStatus.keyword == "Registreret" | EVAL first_registration_year_clean = CASE(_foerste_registrering_aar >= 1900 AND _foerste_registrering_aar <= DATE_EXTRACT("year", NOW()), _foerste_registrering_aar, null) | STATS registered_vehicle_count = COUNT(*), avg_first_registration_year = AVG(first_registration_year_clean), oldest_first_registration_year = MIN(first_registration_year_clean), newest_first_registration_year = MAX(first_registration_year_clean) | LIMIT 1
